semantic.role: Infrastructure facade for discovering, resolving, and writing MCP tool configurations for the ArchSpine CLI.
responsibilities: Resolve the local ArchSpine CLI command path, preferring the project-local node_modules binary.
Format a resolved command into a display-ready string by joining command and arguments.
Detect all known MCP tools (e.g., Cline, Roo-Cline, GitHub Copilot, Claude Desktop) by probing predefined config file paths under the repository and home directory.
Write an MCP configuration JSON file for a given tool, ensuring parent directories exist.
Filter tools that already have an existing config file, returning those that are missing.
Orchestrate the full setup: resolve the command, detect tools, write missing configs, and return a structured result with the details of each setup action.
outOfScope: User interaction like CLI prompts or confirmation dialogs.
Validation of tool binary existence or version compatibility.
Runtime execution of MCP servers or daemon management.
Uninstallation or cleanup of MCP configurations.
invariants: The module relies only on Node.js built-in modules (fs, path, os) and does not depend on any external packages.
It writes configuration files in JSON format as expected by each MCP client.
Tool detection is based on a static set of known config paths; no dynamic discovery.
The setup result is an object with a success boolean and a flat list of items with name, configPath, and action.

changeIntent.architecturalIntent: Provide a standardized, reusable facade for setting up MCP configurations for ArchSpine tools, isolating the logic of command resolution and config writing from higher-level orchestration.
changeIntent.recentChangeIntent: Initial implementation or enhancement of the MCP configuration setup orchestration, including command resolution, tool detection, and config writing.

publicSurface.description: Resolves the absolute path to the archspine command, checking the local node_modules/.bin directory before falling back. Returns an McpResolvedCommand object with command string and resolveArgs.
Joins the command and its arguments into a single display string (e.g., 'npx @archspine/cli').
Probes known config paths for each MCP tool (Cline, Roo-Cline, GitHub Copilot, Claude Desktop) and returns a list of ToolConfig objects with tool name and configPath.
Writes the MCP configuration JSON file at the given configPath using the resolved command object, creating parent directories if needed.
Given a list of ToolConfig, returns only those that currently have an existing config file on disk.

Orchestrates the full MCP setup: resolves the archspine command, detects tools, writes configs for tools that are missing, and returns a SetupResult with success flag and details for each processed tool.
Interface describing a resolved command with 'command' (executable name/path) and 'resolveArgs' (array of arguments like 'run', '--config').
Interface describing an MCP tool entry with 'name' (e.g., 'cline') and 'configPath' (the full path to the tool's config file).
Interface describing one tool setup result with 'name', 'configPath', and 'action' (e.g., 'write' or 'already_exists').
Interface describing the overall setup result with 'success' (boolean) and 'items' (array of SetupResultItem).

English.role: Infrastructure facade for discovering, resolving, and writing MCP tool configurations for the ArchSpine CLI.
responsibilities: Resolve the archspine command path from the project's local node_modules.
Format a resolved command as a readable string.
Detect commonly used MCP tools by checking known configuration file paths.
Write MCP configuration files for tools, creating necessary directories.
Filter tools that already have an existing configuration.
Orchestrate the full setup flow: resolve, detect, write, and return results.
outOfScope: Handling user input or interactive prompts.
Running MCP servers or managing their processes.
Removing or cleaning up MCP configurations.
